title: senecio medullosum
intro: Senecio medullosum, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Senecio medullosum can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
